name: RBL Play Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5% cashback on Netflix, Hotstar, Spotify, YouTube Premium, and other OTT platforms
1% cashback on all other retail purchases

additionalBenefits: 5% cashback on OTT subscriptions (Netflix, Hotstar, Spotify, etc.)
Complimentary OTT subscription on card activation
Direct cashback model - no points to manage
pros: 5% cashback on OTT platforms is unique and useful
Direct cashback model - no complex point calculations
2% on all online spends is decent for an entry card
Low annual fee that's easily waivable
cons: RBL has smaller customer support network
idealFor: OTT and streaming enthusiasts who subscribe to multiple platforms
Young users who spend primarily online and on entertainment

faqs.question: Which OTT platforms qualify for 5% cashback?
faqs.answer: Popular platforms like Netflix, Disney+ Hotstar, Amazon Prime Video, Spotify, YouTube Premium, and similar streaming services qualify. The exact list may be updated periodically.

faqs.question: How is cashback credited?
faqs.answer: Cashback is credited directly to your card statement, typically within 1-2 billing cycles.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹500 annual fee is waived on spending ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous year.
